office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Long-serving representative and former school-board member April Berg faces Tonya Stadlman, whose reviewed public platform evidence is sparse.

candidates.summary: Berg is an incumbent representative and House Finance chair with prior school-board, business, aerospace, and planning experience.
highlights: Emphasizes education, housing, public safety, and community investment [S2][S3]
Chairs House Finance and cites work on tax policy and economic development [S2][S3]

spending.basis: Her documented priorities include education and community investment.

experience.basis: She has served in the House since 2021, previously served on a school board, and chairs House Finance.

candidates.summary: Stadlman's reviewed dossier verifies her candidacy but does not establish a legislative platform or professional profile.
